text: Parliamentary Question: Rahul Gandhi (INC) asked Ministry of Finance about unemployment rate trends among youth (15-29 age group). Starred question requiring oral answer. Budget Session 2024. Addressed rising youth unemployment concerns.

Parliamentary Question: Mahua Moitra (TMC) asked Ministry of Electronics & IT about data breaches in Aadhaar and government portals. Unstarred question. Monsoon Session 2023. Raised digital privacy concerns.

Parliamentary Question: Derek O'Brien (TMC) raised Short Duration Discussion on Manipur ethnic violence and displacement. Winter Session 2023. Demanded PM's statement on Manipur situation. Ministry of Home Affairs responded.

Parliamentary Question: Nishikant Dubey (BJP) asked about NEET examination integrity and paper leak allegations. Starred question. Monsoon Session 2024. Ministry detailed CBI investigation and NTA reforms.
Parliamentary Question: Jairam Ramesh (INC) called attention to MSP guarantee demand and farmer protests. Budget Session 2023. Ministry of Agriculture outlined MSP procurement statistics and reforms.
Parliamentary Question: Asaduddin Owaisi (AIMIM) questioned CAA implementation status and citizenship applications received. Unstarred question. Winter Session 2024. MHA shared implementation data.

Parliamentary Question: Hema Malini (BJP) raised Zero Hour mention on road safety and highway accidents in Mathura constituency. Budget Session 2024. Called for better road infrastructure and speed control.
Parliamentary Question: Manoj Jha (RJD) introduced Private Member Bill for nationwide caste census. Winter Session 2023. Argued for data-driven reservation policy. Bill was discussed but not passed.
